name: Cat Fest Duck Meat Sticks For Cats 45g
description: Description Our duck sausages are loved by all cats. Pamper yours too. Ingredients: duck meat, plant products, minerals. Analytical Components: crude protein 28%, fats 4.5%, crude fiber 0.1%, moisture 25%; energy value – 152.5 kcal. Usage: Serve as a treat during the day. Adjust the amount according to your pet’s needs and condition. Do not overdo it.
